test_anime.jpg.description: Synthetic cartoon-style stick-figure drawing: round face with blonde hair split into two yellow triangular points, blue eyes, smile, torso shown as white rectangle with red triangle and blue trapezoidal skirt/pants. Pink background. Crude placeholder art, not a real manga cover. The yellow triangles on top could be read as either animal ears or a crown — genuinely ambiguous, so neither is placed in must_have.

test_anime_detailed.jpg.description: Synthetic cartoon-style drawing very similar to test_anime.jpg: round face, blue eyes, rosy cheeks, smile, blonde hair, and two yellow triangular points sitting on top of a horizontal yellow band on the head. The horizontal band strongly suggests a crown (王冠/寶冠) rather than animal ears. Same white-rectangle torso with red triangle and blue skirt/pants, pink background. Still crude placeholder art, not a real manga cover.

test_image.jpg.description: Solid red square. Contains no recognizable subject, characters, objects, or scenes. The correct pipeline output is effectively empty — no tag should confidently apply.
